revision.text:
{{military navigation | name = Grand Armee Corps | title = [[Corps]] of the ''[[Grande Armée]]'' | listclass = hlist
| group1 = Regular | list1 = * [[I Corps (Grande Armée)|I]] * [[II Corps (Grande Armée)|II]] * [[III Corps (Grande Armée)|III]] * [[IV Corps (Grande Armée)|IV]] * [[V Corps (Grande Armée)|V]] * [[VI Corps (Grande Armée)|VI]] * [[VII Corps (Grande Armée)|VII]] * [[VIII Corps (Grande Armée)|VIII]] * [[IX Corps (Grande Armée)|IX]] * [[X Corps (Grande Armée)|X]] * [[XI Corps (Grande Armée)|XI]] * [[XII Corps (Grande Armée)|XII]] * [[XIII Corps (Grande Armée)|XIII]] * [[XIV Corps (Grande Armée)|XIV]]
| group2 = Cavalry | list2 = * [[Reserve Cavalry Corps (Grande Armée)|Reserve]] * [[I Cavalry Corps (Grande Armée)|I]] * [[II Cavalry Corps (Grande Armée)|II]] * [[III Cavalry Corps (Grande Armée)|III]] * [[IV Cavalry Corps (Grande Armée)|IV]] * [[V Cavalry Corps (Grande Armée)|V]] * [[VI Cavalry Corps (Grande Armée)|VI]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:France military templates]] </noinclude>
